description_long: This is a modern axe featuring a robust, dark-colored metal head with a single broad cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side. The blade is rectangular with a slightly curved edge, designed for efficient chopping. The handle is straight with a subtle ergonomic curve at the end, and it transitions from a dark upper section to a green lower grip, likely made of a composite or reinforced polymer for durability and comfort. The handle appears to have a non-slip texture and possibly some grip-enhancing features. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or maintenance areas. No visible branding or decorative markings are present, emphasizing function over form.
description: A modern axe with a dark metal head and a straight, green-accented ergonomic handle, designed for efficient chopping and comfortable grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe head and the straight handle with green grip.
description_view_1: Narrow edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the handle's cylindrical cross-section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full profile of the axe head and handle.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the poll, showing the blade's thickness and the handle's straight alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, ergonomic polymer handle with a green grip section, slight curvature at the end, and a round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad rectangular blade with a slightly curved edge and a flat poll, no beard, functional and undecorated.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, likely molded or press-fitted.
